title: Company Summer Outing — May 10
body: This year's summer outing will be held at Club Balai Isabel, Talisay, Batangas. Buses depart from the office at 6:00 AM. RSVPs are due by April 30.
author: Ana Luz Garcia

title: New Hybrid Work Policy Effective May 1
body: Starting May 1, all regular employees may work from home up to 2 days per week. Department heads must approve schedules. See the updated Employee Handbook for details.
author: Jose Rizal Reyes

title: Q1 2026 Performance Results Available
body: Q1 performance review results have been published. Employees can view their ratings and manager feedback in the Employee Portal. Merit increases will be reflected in the May 15 payroll.
author: Michelle Grace Morales

title: Mandatory PhilHealth Form Submission
body: All employees must submit updated PhilHealth Member Data Record (MDR) by April 30. Please coordinate with HR for the updated forms. Failure to comply may affect your contributions.
author: Juan Paulo Bautista

title: Office Renovation: Floor 3 Closure April 25-26
body: The 3rd floor will be closed for renovation on April 25-26. Affected teams (Engineering, IT) will be temporarily relocated to the 2nd floor conference rooms.
author: Maribel Cruz Ramos
